SetLoadBalancerSecurityGroups.document: 负载均衡实例原来绑定了两个安全组：sg-0936o7sd、sg-m2k9q7pa，执行本操作后，安全组 sg-m2k9q7pa 将从此负载均衡实例解绑。
SetLoadBalancerSecurityGroups.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: alb.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: SetLoadBalancerSecurityGroups
<公共请求参数>

{
    "LoadBalancerId": "alb-f8q2xk9m",
    "SecurityGroups": [
        "sg-0936o7sd"
    ]
}
SetLoadBalancerSecurityGroups.title: 从负载均衡实例解绑一个安全组

SetLoadBalancerSecurityGroups.document: 负载均衡实例原来未绑定任何安全组，执行本操作后，安全组 sg-0936o7sd、sg-m2k9q7pa 将被绑定至此负载均衡实例。
SetLoadBalancerSecurityGroups.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: alb.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: SetLoadBalancerSecurityGroups
<公共请求参数>

{
    "LoadBalancerId": "alb-f8q2xk9m",
    "SecurityGroups": [
        "sg-0936o7sd",
        "sg-m2k9q7pa"
    ]
}
SetLoadBalancerSecurityGroups.title: 绑定多个安全组至负载均衡实例

SetLoadBalancerSecurityGroups.document: 负载均衡实例原来已绑定若干个安全组，执行本操作后，所有安全组都将从此负载均衡实例解绑。

POST / HTTP/1.1

<公共请求参数>

{
    "LoadBalancerId": "alb-f8q2xk9m",
    "SecurityGroups": []
}
SetLoadBalancerSecurityGroups.title: 解绑所有安全组
